mapper.select:
SELECT id, ecc_change_date, ecc_applicant, ecc_change_reason, ecc_change_content, ecc_implementer, ecc_checker, ecc_after_status, ecc_data_update, ecc_factory, ecc_reserve_1, ecc_reserve_2, ecc_reserve_3 FROM electric_cabinet_change
AND ecc_change_content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.eccChangeContent}, '%')
AND ecc_implementer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.eccImplementer}, '%')
AND ecc_checker LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.eccChecker}, '%')
AND ecc_after_status = #{queryParams.eccAfterStatus}
AND ecc_factory LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.eccFactory}, '%')

SELECT id, ecc_change_date, ecc_applicant, ecc_change_reason, ecc_change_content, ecc_implementer, ecc_checker, ecc_after_status, ecc_data_update, ecc_factory, ecc_reserve_1, ecc_reserve_2, ecc_reserve_3 FROM electric_cabinet_change
AND ecc_change_content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{eccChangeContent}, '%')
AND ecc_implementer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{eccImplementer}, '%')
AND ecc_checker LIKE CONCAT('%', #{eccChecker}, '%')
AND ecc_after_status = #{eccAfterStatus}
AND ecc_factory LIKE CONCAT('%', #{eccFactory}, '%')
